code:
import io
import string

mut last: Option<String> = None
mut done = false

while not done
  match io.read_line()
  when Some(line)
    if not string.is_empty(string.trim(line))
      last = Some(line)
    end
  when None
    done = true
  end
end

match last
when Some(s)
  println(s)
when None
  println("(none)")
end
